channel.title: GitHub Rust Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: jdx/mise
item.description: dev tools, env vars, task runner

item.title: spaceandtimelabs/sxt-proof-of-sql
item.description: Space and Time | Proof of SQL

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: casey/just
item.description: 🤖 Just a command runner

item.title: eythaann/Seelen-UI
item.description: The Fully Customizable Desktop Environment for Windows 10/11.

item.title: pola-rs/polars
item.description: Dataframes powered by a multithreaded, vectorized query engine, written in Rust

item.title: rust-lang/rust
item.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

item.title: sigp/lighthouse
item.description: Ethereum consensus client in Rust

item.title: stalwartlabs/mail-server
item.description: Secure & Modern All-in-One Mail Server (IMAP, JMAP, POP3, SMTP)

item.title: rerun-io/rerun
item.description: Visualize streams of multimodal data. Free, fast, easy to use, and simple to integrate. Built in Rust.

item.title: leptos-rs/leptos
item.description: Build fast web applications with Rust.

item.title: bevyengine/bevy
item.description: A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

item.title: vercel/turborepo
item.description: Build system optimized for JavaScript and TypeScript, written in Rust

item.title: rpcpool/yellowstone-grpc
item.description: solana geyser grpc service

item.title: tauri-apps/tauri
item.description: Build smaller, faster, and more secure desktop and mobile applications with a web frontend.

item.title: openobserve/openobserve
item.description: 🚀 10x easier, 🚀 140x lower storage cost, 🚀 high performance, 🚀 petabyte scale - Elasticsearch/Splunk/Datadog alternative for 🚀 (logs, metrics, traces, RUM, Error tracking, Session replay).

item.title: Orange-OpenSource/hurl
item.description: Hurl, run and test HTTP requests with plain text.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: rayon-rs/rayon
item.description: Rayon: A data parallelism library for Rust

item.title: mullvad/mullvadvpn-app
item.description: The Mullvad VPN client app for desktop and mobile

item.title: gleam-lang/gleam
item.description: ⭐️ A friendly language for building type-safe, scalable systems!

item.title: tensorzero/tensorzero
item.description: TensorZero creates a feedback loop for optimizing LLM applications — turning production data into smarter, faster, and cheaper models.

item.title: astral-sh/ruff
item.description: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.
